summary: A full-stack luxury delivery and mini-moving platform serving the NYC tri-state area, the Hamptons, and South Florida. Built with Django 5.2, Django REST Framework, Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, and a deep integration stack including Stripe, Onfleet, LangGraph, Claude API, Google Places API, and AWS.
description: ToteTaxi is a full-stack luxury delivery service operating Manhattan to Hamptons, South Florida to NYC airports, and more. The system handles four service types (Mini Moves with tiered packages, Standard Delivery, Specialty Items, and Airport Transfers) with dynamic pricing that accounts for geographic surcharges, weekend/peak premiums, same-day restrictions, and promotional discount codes.

ai_features.description: The platform features an AI-powered customer service assistant built with LangGraph and Claude, streamed to the frontend over Server-Sent Events.
agent_tools: Hand-off to booking wizard with up to 22 pre-filled parameters
ai_features.agent_details: The system prompt was iteratively refined through adversarial testing to ensure accurate service routing, date validation, and appropriate single-service recommendations. Auth-scoped tool binding enforces data access boundaries at the code level, and LangSmith provides full observability into agent behavior in production.

architecture.auth: Dual authentication — httpOnly cookies for desktop with session-based fallback for mobile browser compatibility
architecture.portals: Separate customer and staff portals with role-based access control
architecture.dispatch: Onfleet driver dispatch with real-time webhook status tracking
architecture.payments: Stripe payment processing with atomic booking creation
architecture.notifications: Automated email confirmations with calendar invites
architecture.infrastructure: Backend runs on Fly.io with gevent workers to support concurrent SSE streaming alongside standard API traffic

pricing_engine.description: Sophisticated pricing engine handling geographic surcharges, weekend fees, and service area restrictions
features: Dynamic pricing based on distance, service type, and item count
Geographic surcharges for different delivery zones

testing_and_security.test_suite: Comprehensive test suite with 310+ backend tests via pytest and Playwright E2E tests
testing_and_security.security_audit: Full security audit covering payment flow hardening, input validation, rate limiting, and LLM-specific attack surface analysis

why_this_matters: ToteTaxi demonstrates full-stack engineering at scale — a production logistics platform with AI customer service, complex pricing logic, real-time dispatch, payment processing, and 310+ tests. This is not a demo project. It's a live business platform.
